{"type":"item.completed","item":{"id":"item_77","type":"agent_message","text":"ARCHITECT DECISIONS:
- Proceed with manifest wave: latest frontier evidence has old-style RDB/AOF/rewrite green and only `multipart-aof-manifest-basic-load` red.
- Use Valkey-shaped manifest-lite: manifest load/current-INCR/rewrite finalization stay in `redis-commands::aof` plus `redis-server` lifecycle, with no new crate or type-vocabulary row yet.
- Gate before broadening: expand the JSON persistence frontier first, then run a frontier baseline before implementation.
- BGREWRITEAOF must be parent-finalized: no child/thread may rename over the active writer; v1 may remain synchronous, but no acknowledged write may be lost.

FILES UPDATED:
- `docs/PERSISTENCE_BORING_SPEC_20260523.md`: added manifest-wave architecture addendum and non-goals.
- `harness/work-packets.jsonl`: added the manifest packet chain and moved focused TCL behind it.

- `persistence-aof-manifest-rewrite-finalize-v1`: test-fixer, manifest BGREWRITEAOF finalization.

- `persistence-post-manifest-rewrite-frontier-v1`: runner.
